blended.narrative: Cypress Mountain is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 12 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 2,696 ft. Looking ahead, 18 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 11" of heavy snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: light rain showers, highs of 42°F.
Monday: 2.6" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
